module_goal: Evaluate 5 body wash product concepts through sequential monadic exposure. Capture initial reactions, purchase intent, appeal, uniqueness, believability, brand fit, routine fit, concerns, and comparative preference to identify which 2 concepts to develop.

questions.question_text: How often do you personally use body wash or shower gel?
Which body wash or shower gel brands have you used in the past 3 months? Select all that apply.
Overall, how satisfied are you with the body wash or shower gel you currently use most often?
What, if anything, would you most like to see improved in body wash or shower gel products?
questions.placeholder: e.g., longer-lasting fragrance, better moisturization, more natural ingredients, lower price...

questions.question_text:
Now that you've seen all 5 concepts, please rank them from most to least appealing. Pick your top 3:

1. Dove 60-Second Body Spray — Clean in 60 seconds, no scrubbing
2. Dove Skip — 12-hour moisture, no lotion needed
3. Dove Night Wash — Calming evening shower ritual
4. Dove Yours & Mine — Couples' personalized scent exchange
5. Dove Skin ID — AI-customized body wash for your skin
Thinking about the concept you found most appealing — at the price shown, how likely would you be to buy it?
What would you expect to pay for your most preferred concept? (Enter amount in rupees)

concept1.name: Dove 60-Second Body Spray
concept1.consumer_insight: I wish I could get properly clean when I'm rushing between activities. When I'm squeezing a shower between the gym and a meeting, I need to get clean fast but current body washes take forever to lather, scrub, and rinse off completely.
concept1.key_benefit: Get completely clean in just 60 seconds — no scrubbing, minimal rinsing, maximum speed for your busiest days.
concept1.how_it_works: Proven micellar cleansing technology from Dove's face care range dissolves dirt and oil on contact. 60-second active formula breaks down sweat and grime while you wait, rinses away easily. Aerosol spray format covers your body evenly in seconds — no time wasted building lather.
concept1.packaging: Slim aluminum aerosol can with matte silver finish and single blue stripe. Large '60' prominently displayed.
concept1.price: ₹199 for 100ml trial size, ₹399 for 200ml regular size

concept2.name: Dove Skip
concept2.consumer_insight: I want to moisturize my skin after every shower, but I always forget or skip it because it's such a hassle. I wish there was a way to get soft, hydrated skin without having to add another step to my routine.
concept2.key_benefit: Get 12-hour moisturized skin straight from the shower — no body lotion needed.
concept2.how_it_works: Advanced lipid-lock technology deposits a moisture barrier on your skin while you wash, so hydration stays sealed in even after toweling off. Contains 3x more moisturizing cream than regular body wash. Proven effective even in harsh conditions like air conditioning and dry winter weather.
concept2.packaging: Dove's familiar bottle shape but 20% wider. Cream-colored base with subtle gold accents and pump dispenser. 'SKIP' prominently displayed. Small icon showing crossed-out lotion bottle with 'Replaces Body Lotion' text.

concept3.name: Dove Night Wash
concept3.consumer_insight: I wish my night shower could feel truly different from my rushed morning routine. My evening shower is the only time that's completely mine, but I'm using the same energizing body wash that's meant to wake me up.
concept3.key_benefit: Transform your night shower into a calming ritual that helps you unwind and prepare for sleep.
concept3.how_it_works: Contains chamomile and slow-release lavender oils clinically shown to reduce stress hormones when absorbed through skin. Creates a richer, slower lather that encourages you to take your time. Warm, muted fragrance designed specifically for evening use — not the sharp, energizing scents of morning washes.
concept3.packaging: Deep matte navy bottle with soft-touch finish. Shorter, wider shape. Muted gold 'NIGHT WASH' text with subtle crescent moon detail. No white elements on front panel.

concept4.name: Dove Yours & Mine
concept4.consumer_insight: I love wearing my partner's clothes or using their products because their scent makes me feel close to them throughout the day. But there's no way for us to actually carry each other's essence with us in our daily routines.
concept4.key_benefit: Carry a subtle trace of each other's personalized scent throughout your day, keeping you connected even when apart.
concept4.how_it_works: Personalized fragrance quiz analyzes your scent preferences and creates custom formulas from Dove's library of 200+ fragrance compounds. Each partner receives a body wash inspired by the other's scent profile, so you literally carry each other's essence after every shower. Dove's 65+ years of fragrance expertise ensures long-lasting, skin-safe scents.
concept4.packaging: Two 200ml bottles — one soft blush pink, one warm beige. When placed together, the bottle shapes create a subtle heart silhouette. 'YOURS & MINE' in elegant script. Comes in premium matte white gift box with gold accents.
concept4.price: ₹799 for couples kit (2×200ml), ₹999 for premium gift edition

concept5.name: Dove Skin ID
concept5.consumer_insight: I wish I could find a body wash that actually works for my specific skin needs. My skin is different on different parts of my body — oily in some areas, dry in others, with dark patches on my elbows. But every body wash I try treats my whole body the same way.
concept5.key_benefit: Get a body wash that's custom-made for your unique skin needs across your entire body.
concept5.how_it_works: AI skin analysis technology examines your uploaded photo and personal responses to identify your specific skin needs across different body areas. Custom-blended with targeted active ingredients like niacinamide for uneven tone, salicylic acid for body acne, or ceramides for dryness. Your personalized formula is freshly made and arrives with your name on the label.
concept5.packaging: Clean, frosted bottle with your name printed on the label like a prescription. Product color varies by formula (amber, pale green, or soft pink visible through bottle). Arrives in a white box addressed to you with a booklet explaining your personalized formula.
concept5.price: ₹699 for first order (includes skin analysis), ₹549 for refills, ₹499 with quarterly subscription
